mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_plan_assign(plan_id, user_id, status, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{planId}, #{userId}, #{status}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM training_plan_assign WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id,plan_id,user_id,status,create_time,deleted FROM training_plan_assign WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id,plan_id,user_id,status,create_time,deleted FROM training_plan_assign WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE training_plan_assign SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM training_plan_assign WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0
